root_cause: Requested hostPort 0.0.0.0:8080/TCP is already allocated on candidate nodes
evidence: Scheduler reported hostPort allocation conflict 3 time(s) within the last 20 minutes
Representative scheduler message: 0/4 nodes are available: 4 node(s) didn't have free ports for the requested pod ports.

causes.message: Requested hostPort tuple is already allocated on candidate node(s)
Scheduler cannot place the Pod until a node has a free matching hostPort

pod:ingress-system/ingress-gateway-7d6f5: 0/4 nodes are available: 4 node(s) didn't have free ports for the requested pod ports.

likely_causes: Another Pod on candidate nodes is already using the same <hostIP, hostPort, protocol> tuple
A DaemonSet or rollout keeps the previous Pod instance bound to the same hostPort
The cluster has too few eligible nodes with that hostPort still free
suggested_checks: Check which workload is already using the requested hostPort on eligible nodes
Reduce hostPort usage or increase the number of eligible nodes with free ports
